edge_hypothesis: MACD histogram zero-line crossovers confirmed by price position relative to EMA_50 catch momentum shifts aligned with the intermediate trend. The dual-confirmation (momentum + trend context) reduces whipsaws vs MACD alone. Wider exits (3:1 R:R) address the 62% fee drag identified in advisory data. On ETH/4h, trending regime PF=1.054 suggests momentum-following signals have structural edge. Regime assumption: TRENDING (ADX>20 for gated variant). Invalidation: if PF < 0.90 with 100+ trades, MACD histogram zero-cross is not a reliable momentum signal for ETH.

variants.name: macd_zeroline_standard
variants.description: Standard MACD zero-line crossover with EMA_50 trend context. 2.5:1 R:R. Tests baseline MACD signal quality on ETH without additional filters.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (histogram zero-line cross up).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (histogram zero-line cross down).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back below 0.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back above 0.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (2.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: MACD lag causes late entries after move already extended
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 2.5x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: macd_wide_exit_fee_killer
variants.description: MACD zero-line cross with extreme 3.5:1 R:R specifically designed to overcome fee drag. Advisory shows 62% of gross eaten by fees on ETH/4h. Wider TP means fewer round-trips and lower cumulative fee impact per dollar of profit.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (histogram zero-line cross up).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (histogram zero-line cross down).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back below 0.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back above 0.
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.5x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: Very wide TP may rarely be hit, reducing realized win rate
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.5x ATR_14 from entry.

variants.name: macd_adx_gated_trending
variants.description: MACD zero-line cross with additional ADX>20 regime gate. Tests whether filtering MACD signals to trending-only regimes improves PF by avoiding choppy false crossovers. Advisory data shows transitional regimes are toxic across all assets.
entry_long: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from <= 0 to > 0 (histogram zero-line cross up).
Close > EMA_50 confirms intermediate uptrend context.
ADX_14 > 20 confirms trending regime (filter out ranging/choppy markets).
entry_short: MACDh_12_26_9 crosses from >= 0 to < 0 (histogram zero-line cross down).
Close < EMA_50 confirms intermediate downtrend context.
ADX_14 > 20 confirms trending regime (filter out ranging/choppy markets).
filters: Backtester executable indicators: EMA, SMA, RSI, ATR, MACD, Bollinger Bands, Stochastic, ADX, CCI, Williams %R, OBV, VWAP, Ichimoku, Supertrend, Donchian Channels.
exit_rules: Exit long when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back below 0.
Exit short when MACDh_12_26_9 crosses back above 0.
Exit if ADX_14 drops below 15 (trend exhaustion).
Exit on ATR-based take profit hit (3.0x ATR).
Exit on ATR-based stop loss hit (1.0x ATR).
Hypothesis failure mode guard: ADX filter may lag regime changes, causing late exits
risk_rules: Stop loss at 1.0x ATR_14 below/above entry.
Take profit at 3.0x ATR_14 from entry.
Max drawdown cap: 15% (tighter cap for regime-gated variant).
